text: I forgot my password and now my account is locked after too many attempts. I have a client call in 30 minutes and can't log in.
Outlook won't open on my laptop. It just hangs on 'loading profile'. I can see email fine on my phone.
The VPN keeps disconnecting every few minutes when I work from home. It started this morning.
I got an email saying my mailbox is full and asking me to click a link to verify my password. Looks a little off, is it real?
Our whole floor lost network access. Nobody in Accounting can reach any shared drives or the internet.
My monitor won't turn on. The laptop works but the external screen on my docking station is black.
Please install Adobe Acrobat Pro on my workstation. I need it to edit PDFs for onboarding paperwork.
New hire starts Monday. Can you create their AD account and set up M365 (email, Teams, OneDrive)?
Teams keeps crashing when I try to share my screen in meetings. Restarting doesn't help.
I think I clicked a phishing link in an email and entered my credentials. What should I do?
The shared printer on the 3rd floor shows offline for everyone. We have invoices that need printing today.
Can I get access to the Finance SharePoint site? My manager approved it last week.
